pi_items.source: setup_task.sh explicitly patches the camera name via Nx Witness API to match CAMERA_NAME variable 'Lobby Camera'.
setup_task.sh defines VIDEO_FILE as '/workspace/data/videos/mall_pedestrian.mp4' which is copied for the testcamera to use.
export_result.sh reads from '/home/ga/traffic_report.txt' to generate the report content payload.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on the real Mall Dataset for crowd counting, containing 2000 frames and approximately 62,315 total head annotations (averaging ~31 people per frame). It correctly sets the target camera name to 'Lobby Camera' via API, utilizes the 'mall_pedestrian.mp4' video stream through testcamera, and expects the final agent output report at the designated path /home/ga/traffic_report.txt.
